utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No ... no wait ... wait ! I can not just let you hang up ! Just please talk to me .

utterances.speaker: Earl
utterances.text: Well ... I only have one thing to do today . I guess I could push it back .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah ! Now , why do you want to kill yourself ?

utterances.speaker: Earl
utterances.text: It is just that I uh , have been working for ten years now at this meaningless , dead ... end job and nobody here even knows I exist !

emotion_cause.span: 4_I uh , have been working for ten years now at this meaningless , dead ... end job and nobody here even knows I exist !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No look , I ... I am sure that people know you exist !

emotion_cause.span: 7_I ... I am sure that people know you exist !
